title: Sonzacate Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sonzacate with a Z-Score of +3.83. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sonzacate is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 68%, and the wind speed is 7.4 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, which is typical for a heat wave.
conclusion: Activation of emergency response protocols is recommended due to the critical level of this heat wave.
